infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Risk Radar needs your location to show nearby crimes and provide safety alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Risk Radar needs background location access to monitor high-risk zones and send timely safety alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Risk Radar needs location access to track crimes and keep you safe.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Risk Radar needs camera access to take photos when reporting crimes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Risk Radar needs photo library access to attach evidence when reporting crimes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Risk Radar needs microphone access for video recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Risk Radar to use your location to provide safety alerts and track nearby crimes.
